allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\Docker\\Docker\\resources\\bin\\docker.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { "$p -> $\(Test-Path $p\)" }; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Get-Command fnm,nvm,volta,winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Source)

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); npm install @prisma/client @aws-sdk/client-s3 sharp; npm install -D prisma tsx)

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); npm approve-scripts sharp prisma @prisma/engines esbuild unrs-resolver; npm rebuild sharp prisma @prisma/engines esbuild unrs-resolver)

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); wsl --status; "---"; docker --version; "---"; Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; "Docker Desktop запущен")
PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { npm run build })
